title: Malaysia appoints new anti-graft chief
description:
KUALA LUMPUR: Malaysia appointed on Saturday a former high court judge as the country’s new anti-graft czar to replace its outgoing chief who was dogged by allegations of abuse of power and illegal shareholding.
	The appointment of Abdul Halim Aman comes as Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s government faces increased scrutiny on promises made to tackle corruption in the Southeast Asian nation.

title: Chinese panda pair headed to US zoo
description:
BEIJING: Two giant pandas from China are headed to Atlanta on a new 10-year conservation deal.
	Pandas Ping Ping, a male, and Fu Shuang, a female, will live at Zoo Atlanta, China Wildlife Conservation Association said in a statement Friday.
	The organization signed the research agreement with the United States zoo last year, it said, noting the deal continues “the ‘panda bond’ shared by the people of both nations for more than 20 years.”

title: Long Island serial killer sentenced to life in prison
description: A chilling mystery that haunted New York for more than a decade has finally reached a definitive end. On June 17, a Long Island architect was sentenced to life in prison without parole for a horrifying string of serial killings. The "Gilgo Killer" targeted young women mostly in their 20s, who worked as online escorts.

title: Mixed reactions over US-Iran deal in Lebanon
description: Although the US-Iran deal brings hope to Lebanon, reactions remain mixed. Lebanon may be mentioned in the first paragraph, it is not included in the $300 billion reconstruction fund despite the south of the country having been totally destroyed, and Israeli strikes have not stopped. FRANCE 24's Renée Davis tells us more about it from Beirut.

title: Iran deal 'worst policy blunder in decades': criticism spreads across US political spectrum
description: US President Donald Trump and his Iranian counterpart, President Masoud Pezeshkian, have both now signed the memorandum of understanding, designed to bring the conflict in the middle east to a close. The document, which consists of 14 points, has not yet been released, but officials have clarified much of what's in it. The memorandum has been met with heavy criticism back in the US, from both Democrats and Republicans. FRANCE 24's Douglas Herbert

title: At the mercy of Silicon Valley? Europe exposed by Trump AI export ban
description: Is it better to persuade or to confront? French leader Emmanuel Macron is opting for the royal treatment with Donald Trump at Versailles, what with a dinner to celebrate the 250th anniversary of the King of France's support for the birth of a new nation. It's all about keeping the US president on board: on Ukraine, reopening the Strait of Hormuz and more. But will flattery work when it comes to the AI revolution?

title: Explosions and gunfire heard at airport in Niger's capital Niamey

title: Iraq exported 10 million barrels of oil through Strait of Hormuz in April
description:
BAGHDAD: Iraq exported 10 million barrels of oil via the Strait of Hormuz in April, down from about 93 million barrels monthly before ​the Iran war, the country’s new oil minister, Basim Mohammed, said at a press conference on Saturday.
	The closure of the Strait of Hormuz due to the Iran war has curtailed oil exports from Saudi Arabia, the UAE, Kuwait and Iraq, sending prices sharply higher.

title: Ex-Nigeria oil minister cleared in UK bribery trial
description: Diezani Alison-Madueke had been accused of receiving bribes from oil tycoons but was found not guilty by a jury at Southwark Crown Court.

title: Finland Lifts a Nuclear Weapons Ban, Eyeing an Uncertain World
description: The Nordic country, which shares an 830-mile border with Russia, said the move would strengthen the NATO alliance, which it joined three years ago.

title: Trump Defends Deal to End the War With Iran as Details Emerge
description: President Trump lashed out at critics who say the agreement achieves less than the one President Barack Obama signed in 2015, and he threatened to bomb Iran again if it violated the deal.

title: Trump Angrily Defends Iran Deal and Reveals, Again, His Obsession With Obama
description: President Trump denied that the United States would be part of a $300 billion rebuilding fund for Iran and argued that his agreement was better than the one Barack Obama struck in 2015.

title: Live Updates: U.S. Details Agreement With Iran as Trump Departs G7 Summit
description: A U.S. official provided what was described as the text of the preliminary agreement, which outlined a $300 billion plan for Iran’s reconstruction and 60 days of talks on its nuclear program.

title: ‘Shall not develop nuclear weapons’: 14-point memorandum of understanding between the US and Iran
description:
Sides declare 'immediate, permanent end to war on all fronts, including Lebanon'; fate of Iran's enriched uranium will be 'adequately addressed in final deal' to be inked within 60 days
The post Shall not develop nuclear weapons: 14-point memorandum of understanding between the US and Iran appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Hezbollah expecting major cash injection from Iran once deal sealed with US — sources
description:
US official says funds going to terror group will not be unfrozen, as analysts say outcome of war will be political boon to Hezbollah, will bolster its resistance narrative
The post Hezbollah expecting major cash injection from Iran once deal sealed with US  sources appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: In full comptrol: Why Netanyahu fought so hard over the state comptroller election
description:
Critics of Michael Rabello's appointment argue Netanyahu's longtime lawyer and adviser may adopt a politically partisan approach over what he does and does not audit
The post In full comptrol: Why Netanyahu fought so hard over the state comptroller election appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Knesset grants Likud MK Gotliv immunity for exposing Shin Bet agent’s identity
description:
Vote follows chaotic hearings in which coalition lawmakers rally behind firebrand colleague; opposition lawmakers decry move as 'disgrace' and 'slap in the face' to security forces
The post Knesset grants Likud MK Gotliv immunity for exposing Shin Bet agents identity appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: READ: Full U.S.-Iran memorandum of understanding
description: Below is the full text of the U.S.-Iran memorandum of understanding, as delivered by a senior administration official in a briefing with reporters. Because the print text has not been released, this transcript may be inexact, for example in terms of punctuation. 1. The United States of America and the Islamic Republic of Iran and their allies in the current war, by signing this MOU, declare the immediate and permanent termination of military oper

title: Diluting uranium, oil sales: What's in the draft US-Iran deal?
description: Senior US officials on Wednesday disclosed the contents of a draft memorandum of understanding with Iran, ending days of secrecy ahead of a planned signing ceremony on Friday. The document outlines an immediate ceasefire, steps toward lifting US sanctions, the restoration of commercial shipping and negotiations on Iran’s nuclear programme.

title: World Cup 2026: Resilient DR Congo hold off Ronaldo's Portugal onslaught
description: Portugal and DR Congo played out a dramatic 1-1 draw in Houston as the African underdogs showed remarkable resilience against one of the tournament's favorites. João Neves gave the Portuguese an early lead, but Yoane Wissa's equaliser just before half-time earned the Leopards a crucial point in their first World Cup appearance since 1974.
